title: BCII Receives Very Favorable Accounting Treatment Opinion for Its Coupon Token Program
body: CFO Squad Inc. issues favorable accounting opinion confirming the Super Coupon Token qualifies under FASB ASU 2023-08 for fair-value measurement of crypto assets with changes recognized in net income. The opinion replaces the previous impairment-only model and creates the accounting foundation for BCII's planned adoption strategy — converting promotional spending into a balance-sheet-building activity. The treatment is designed to create an asymmetric EPS incentive that makes adoption systemic rather than optional for public-company issuers.

title: Remergify Releases Comprehensive White Paper on BCII Enterprises' Groundbreaking Blockchain Coupon Token Architecture
body: Detailed white paper examines the emerging market opportunity, technical architecture on Ethereum Layer-2, transfer agent integration methodology, the 55-month five-installment distribution schedule, and the three addressable markets (corporate shareholder engagement, digital advertising, and creator/charity/SMB distribution). The white paper presents the economic case for the coupon-as-tradable-asset architecture and the FASB accounting treatment implications for public-company adopters.

title: BCII ENTERPRISES INC. (OTCID:BCII) CEO Strategic Statement: Tokenized Dividend-Coupon Platform Transformation
body: CEO Joseph M. Salvani outlines the comprehensive vision, financial model, and strategic roadmap for the Super Coupon Token platform. The statement describes the platform as the fulfillment of BCII's nine-year blockchain mission — from Blockchain Industries Inc. through the Super Coupon Token — and details the structural thesis around capitalizing distribution-list assets as a new balance-sheet instrument under favorable FASB accounting treatment.
